title: Data Classification on boards

posts.author: caroline.bryngelson (Caroline)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m looking for a way to add data classification/security class to boards, in a similar way as Miro does it.

A dropdown in the board description, maybe? And make it part of the board creation dialogue (with admin option to make it default or not).

posts.author: Henriok (Henrik Wannheden)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’d be so awesome!
Our organisation is doing security certifications, like ISO 27001 and NIS 2, and classing of information assets in this way is essential.
It could be a deal breaker for us.
